narrative:
Madison Twp township has 2,022 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.1 percentage points.
